calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold W. Evje, Esq. and David Foran, Esq. appearing for the defendant. Case settled per stipulation of parties, not reported. Trial date is vacated.
